zh.Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林
英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林
zh.Dover Castle, Kent, England: 英國肯特多福 卡素
zh.Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England,: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Ashton 1st於大約1303年出生在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林時，他的父親Sir John de Ashton, Knight22歲，母親Margery Byron18歲。他於大約1320年之後與Elizabeth Gorges在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1385年在英國肯特多福 卡素被列為'constable of dover & warden of 'cinque ports'. 。他去世於1385年1月9日在英國肯特多福享年83歲，埋葬在英國肯特多福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Ashton 1st于大约1303年出生在英国藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林时，他的父亲Sir John de Ashton, Knight22岁，母亲Margery Byron18岁。他于大约1320年之后与Elizabeth Gorges在英国藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1385年在英国肯特多福 卡素被列为'constable of dover & warden of 'cinque ports'. 。他去世于1385年1月9日在英国肯特多福享年83岁，埋葬在英国肯特多福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Ashton 1st was born about 1303, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John de Ashton, Knight, was 22 and his mother, Margery Byron, was 18. He married Elizabeth Gorges after about 1320, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1385, at the age of 83, his occupation is listed as 'constable of dover & warden of 'cinque ports'.  in Dover Castle, Kent, England. He died on 9 January 1385, in Dover, Kent, England, at the age of 83, and was buried in Dover, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Ashton 1st est né environ 1303, à Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Ashton, Knight, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margery Byron, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Gorges après environ 1320, à Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1385, à l’âge de 83 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est 'constable of dover & warden of 'cinque ports'.  à Dover Castle, Kent, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 9 janvier 1385, à Dover, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Dover, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Ashton 1st um 1303 in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Ashton, Knight 22 und seine Mutter Margery Byron 18. Er hat nach um 1320 in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England Elizabeth Gorges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1385, als er 83 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als 'constable of dover & warden of 'cinque ports'.  in Dover Castle, Kent, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. Januar 1385 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Dover, Kent, England und wurde in Dover, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Ashton 1st è nato il circa 1303 nel Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Ashton, Knight, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margery Byron, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Gorges dopo il circa 1320, nel Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1385, all'età di 83 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come 'constable of dover & warden of 'cinque ports'.  nel Dover Castle, Kent, England. Morì il 9 gennaio 1385, nel Dover, Kent, England, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Dover, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Ashton 1stが約1303年にイギリスランカシュアイアアシュトン-ウンデル-リンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Ashton, Knightは22歳，母Margery Byronは18歳であった。約1320年以後にイギリスランカシュアイアアシュトン-ウンデル-リンでElizabeth Gorgesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1385年，83歳の時，イギリスケントドバー カストルでの職業は'constable of dover & warden of 'cinque ports'. と記録されている。彼は1385年1月9日にイギリスケントドバーで83歳で死去し，イギリスケントドバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Ashton 1st(이)가 대략 1303년 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Ashton, Knight(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Byron(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 이후 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 Elizabeth Gorges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1385년, 83세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 켄트 도버 카스틀에서 'constable of dover & warden of 'cinque ports'. 이었다. 그는 1385년 1월 9일 영국 켄트 도버에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 도버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Ashton 1st nasceu aproximadamente 1303, em Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Ashton, Knight, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margery Byron, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Gorges após aproximadamente 1320, em Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1385, com 83 anos, sua profissão aparece como 'constable of dover & warden of 'cinque ports'.  em Dover Castle, Kent, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1385, em Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Dover, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Ashton 1st родился около 1303 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Ashton, Knight было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Byron, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Gorges после около 1320 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1385 году, в возрасте 83 лет,  он работал по профессии 'constable of dover & warden of 'cinque ports'.  в местности довир кастл, кэнт, Англия. Он умер 9 января 1385 г. в местности довир, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности довир, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Ashton 1st nació aproximadamente 1303, en Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Ashton, Knight, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margery Byron, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Gorges después de aproximadamente 1320, en Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1385, a la edad de 83 años, su ocupación registrada era 'constable of dover & warden of 'cinque ports'.  en Dover Castle, Kent, Inglaterra. Murió el 9 de enero de 1385, en Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Dover, Kent, Inglaterra.
